title: Soul Under Sculk (SUS)
description: Transform into a very Suspicious being of Sculk.
body:
**Soul Under Sculk** introduces the ability for the player to transform into a **Scroulkkoth**,  an Eldritch Being shaped from Sculk and Ender.

The Scroulkkoth is slightly smaller and bouncier than the typical player, and its appearance can be customised. Each material on its body can be dyed a different color, or set to cycle through a gradient of colors.

Also it looks incredibly Suspicious.

![Created for ModFest: Singularity](https://blob.jortage.com/blobs/5/d4d/5d4d14d96db2e2024d87cf5606cb7ce6421633a002e328947f85d210ba250ecb9f86de8df210dd031be2d4eafb0980494e7a1e8e99590a550abaa42d82768b9f)
